ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the news article (1 - Published, 2 - Unpublished, 3 - Archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., finance, technology, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "hq_location" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock price was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "company_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company news record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article belongs to */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, investor, analyst, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user is interested in */,
  "news_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of news updates the user wants to receive */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user (e.g., email, SMS, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article the sentiment analysis belongs to */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification, etc.) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price prediction record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used to make the prediction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted stock price */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the stock price prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_predictions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_api_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news API configuration record */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the news API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the news API */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API URL for the news API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
